integration_validation_v2.evidence: bulk.rs:368-449 bulk_tag_characters_with_receipt opens a tx, require_all_characters_exist prevalidates all targets before any INSERT, writes one receipt + one event, commits atomically. Test atelier_bulk_operations_tests.rs:172-255 proves missing target rejects whole batch (no mutation, no receipt) and success writes one linked kernel_event_ledger row (assert_one_bulk_receipt_event joins atelier_event to kernel_event_ledger lines 81-104).

integration_validation_v3.basis: v2 PASS re-affirmed in v3: deliverable unchanged by remediation diff; full-crate test sweep green on Handshake-managed PostgreSQL at 17b2abd4 proves no regression. v2 evidence retained in integration_validation_v2.

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.
